description:
Run the Bologna Pasubio simulation using /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg and generate transit stop telemetry at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/stopinfos.xml. Analyze the telemetry to compute bus dwell statistics from <stopinfo> elements containing started, ended, busStop, and id attributes. Calculate dwell duration as (ended - started). Compute the following metrics: total_stop_events, average_dwell_time (mean duration, rounded to 2 decimal places), max_single_dwell (maximum single duration, rounded to 2 decimal places), busiest_bus_stop (ID with highest event count, lexicographical tie-break), and longest_total_dwell_vehicle (vehicle ID with highest cumulative dwell time, lexicographical tie-break). Save the results to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/utilization_report.txt using the format:

total_stop_events=<value>
average_dwell_time=<value>
max_single_dwell=<value>
busiest_bus_stop=<value>
longest_total_dwell_vehicle=<value>
